findings.message: Prometheus scrape job 'prometheus' (line 18) has no corresponding alert rule to monitor Prometheus itself. Without alerts on prometheus_tsdb_* or prometheus_sd_* metrics, Prometheus failures and service discovery issues may be silent.
findings.suggestion: Create a prometheus alert rule file (e.g., infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/prometheus_alerts.yml) with alerts for PrometheusDown (up{job="prometheus"}==0) and prometheus_tsdb_symbol_table_size_bytes if applicable.

findings.message: otel-collector service is deployed (line 76) but has no Prometheus scrape job to monitor it. The collector's health and performance cannot be observed, and failures may go undetected.
findings.suggestion: Add a scrape job in infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml for otel-collector with metrics endpoint (e.g., otel-collector:8888 if metrics are enabled), and create an alert rule to monitor its availability.

findings.message: worker service (line 29-50) and beat service (line 51-63) in services.yml (merged for prod/staging) are missing APP_OTEL_ENABLED and APP_OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT environment variables. These runtime surfaces will not send traces to Tempo, creating an observability gap in production workloads.
findings.suggestion: Add APP_OTEL_ENABLED: "true" and APP_OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT: "http://otel-collector:4317" to both worker and beat service environment sections in services.yml, or define them in a separate overlay to match app service configuration.
